methodology.percentile_method: raw sample at index ceil(p * (n-1)), no interpolation
methodology.spec_step: §9 all 13 steps + §9 step 13 emit via NullSink (true Allow per call)
methodology.notes: Concurrent L0: N independent sessions per spec §5.2 — each thread owns its CompiledAuthority and a 1024-entry pool of pre-finalized actions with incrementing sequence_ids. Authority.sequence_next is reset to ALLOW_SEQ_START when the pool wraps (untimed atomic store). Every per-call sample is a true Allow; deviates from the single-threaded L0 methodology (which used one action repeatedly and got SEQUENCE_REPLAY for iters 1..N).
